channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-04-26 18:40 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Starlink’s high-speed internet is available in your area. Experience speeds up to 400+ Mbps to strea...
item.description: Starlink’s high-speed internet is available in your area. Experience speeds up to 400+ Mbps to stream your favorite shows and sports, work from home, browse social media and more.

item.title: @elonmusk: This door in Westminster Abbey is older than most modern nation-states. Made in the 1050s from an En...
item.description: This door in Westminster Abbey is older than most modern nation-states. Made in the 1050s from an English oak, it's the only surviving Anglo-Saxon door in Britain.

item.title: @elonmusk: The road to making life multiplanetary starts right here in Starbase.
item.description: The road to making life multiplanetary starts right here in Starbase.

item.title: @elonmusk: This is one you should watch on a big TV. One of the most incredible corporate videos I ever have se...
item.description: This is one you should watch on a big TV. One of the most incredible corporate videos I ever have seen and I was with the GoPro video team the night it released its Hero 2 video that brought that company to an IPO.

item.title: @elonmusk: It’s astonishing just how big the AfD has grown in Germany. The latest INSA poll has the party at a ...
item.description: It’s astonishing just how big the AfD has grown in Germany. The latest INSA poll has the party at a record-high 28%, twice the size of Germany’s social democratic party SPD. The only other hard-right parties on this level or higher are FPÖ (🇦🇹 37%), RN (🇫🇷 34%) & FdI (🇮🇹 28%)

item.title: @elonmusk: "In light of this evening's events, I ask that all Americans recommit with their hearts in resolving...
item.description: "In light of this evening's events, I ask that all Americans recommit with their hearts in resolving our differences peacefully." - President Donald J. Trump 🇺🇸

item.title: @elonmusk: This is true only if you start after 9/11, exclude all BLM rioting, and count all killings by white ...
item.description: This is true only if you start after 9/11, exclude all BLM rioting, and count all killings by white prison gangs - but not minority ones like the Black Guerilla Family and La Raza ("The Race") groups. Literally. That is how you get this data. The mere fact that probably 40% of all murders annually are committed by Black members of organized street gangs/organizations ought to call it into question. Remember "GIGO?"

item.title: @elonmusk: "Left wing violence is the problem in America. Charlie Kirk was murde*ed by a left wing radical. Pre...
item.description: "Left wing violence is the problem in America. Charlie Kirk was murde*ed by a left wing radical. President was almost kil*ed. We have a real crisis where there are far too many left wing people who don't want to disagree, but want to try kill their fellow citizens" 一 JD Vance

item.title: @elonmusk: FSD v14.3.2 has been driving me all over LA tonight. This build is f-ing incredible, smooth as butte...
item.description: FSD v14.3.2 has been driving me all over LA tonight. This build is f-ing incredible, smooth as butter and it’s fascinating how well it can handle complex traffic scenarios, road closures and tight roads. Best FSD build ever, holy shit. Tesla cooked here.

item.title: @elonmusk: "You can make an AI go insane if you force it to believe things that aren't true - AI must be maxima...
item.description: "You can make an AI go insane if you force it to believe things that aren't true - AI must be maximally truth-seeking" —Elon Musk

item.title: @elonmusk: Saint Michael the Archangel, defend us in battle. Be our defense against the wickedness and snares o...
item.description: Saint Michael the Archangel, defend us in battle. Be our defense against the wickedness and snares of the Devil. May God rebuke him, we humbly pray, and do thou, O Prince of the heavenly hosts, by the power of God, cast into hell Satan, and all the evil spirits, who prowl about the world seeking the ruin of souls. Amen.

item.title: @elonmusk: If they’re willing to die to assassinate, imagine what they will do if they gain political power
item.description: If they’re willing to die to assassinate, imagine what they will do if they gain political power

item.title: @elonmusk: In shocking news, calling your political opponents Nazis makes crazy people want to kill them. Who c...
item.description: In shocking news, calling your political opponents Nazis makes crazy people want to kill them. Who could have predicted this?

item.title: @elonmusk: New Grok Imagine model just dropped with much better lip sync & sound. Nothing in this video is real...
item.description: New Grok Imagine model just dropped with much better lip sync & sound. Nothing in this video is real.
